name: PERMIAN BASIN ROYALTY TRUST
summary: Permian Basin Royalty Trust (PBT) is a statutory trust that holds royalty interests in oil and gas properties in the Permian Basin. The trust generates income from royalties on oil and gas production. Reserve engineering services are provided by Cawley, Gillespie & Associates, Inc., with Argent Trust Company serving as trustee.

products.name: Oil and Gas Royalty Interests
products.description: Royalty interests in Permian Basin oil and gas properties generating income distributions to trust unitholders.

partnerships.description: Petroleum consulting firm providing oil and gas reserve reports for the trust's SEC filings.
Serves as trustee for the Permian Basin Royalty Trust.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
